name: supernono-codex
description: SuperNoNo Codex hooks PROTOTYPE. Explores forwarding fine-grained Codex lifecycle events (tool use, permission requests) to the local SuperNoNo desktop pet via its unified signal protocol (POST 127.0.0.1:4174/signal). PROTOTYPE: the hooks manifest format is UNVERIFIED on this Codex version — see README.md.

interface.shortDescription: Drive the SuperNoNo desktop pet from Codex lifecycle events (prototype)
